_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct all-source target research to include the use of open source materials in the target language.
reference_document_element_description: Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with engineering teams to operationalize novel approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.397), AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.380).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.336). Shared vocabulary: [research]. DCWF-only terms [conduct, include, language, materials, open, source] vs WIDAI-only terms [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.863, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 14-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:61.3%, C:38.7%). No dominant classification for "Conduct all-source target research to include the use of open source materials i" vs "Translate research findings into production-applicable methods, working with eng" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.437 > STS 0.336 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [research] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [research]. DCWF-only: [conduct, include, language, materials, open, source]. WIDAI-only: [applicable, approaches, engineering, findings, methods, novel].
